heading: Omitted
label: 1034 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for per capita distributions to members of the Cherokee Band upon completion of roll, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 88–457, § 478 Stat. 555Aug. 20, 1964
